x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CMDB Health jobs produce the Completeness and Correctness scores that quantify AI data readiness. Without these jobs running, CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 cannot return real scores.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable all 3 CMDB Health jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Without these running, CMDB health scores cannot be calculated.
